nasb.text: How could one chase a thousand, And two put ten thousand to flight, Unless their Rock had sold them, And the Lord had given them up?

esv.text: How could one have chased a thousand, and two have put ten thousand to flight, unless their Rock had sold them, and the Lord had given them up?

cnv.text: 如果不是他們的磐石把他們出賣了， 如果不是耶和華把他們交出來， 一人怎能追趕一千人， 二人怎能使萬人逃跑呢？

ccb.text: 若不是他们的磐石卖掉他们， 若不是耶和华抛弃他们， 一人怎能赶散他们千人？ 二人怎能击溃他们万人？
